chapter_title.ar: باب الصَّلَاةِ فِي ثَوْبٍ وَاحِدٍ وَ الْمَرْأَةِ فِي كَمْ تُصَلِّي وَ صَلَاةِ الْعُرَاةِ وَ التَّوَشُّحِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 59 – The Salāt performed in one piece of cloth, and the woman, how many (clothes) can she pray Salāt in, and a Salāt of the naked, and wearing the scarf

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/302)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/302)
text: رَجُلٍ يُصَلِّي فِي سَرَاوِيلَ لَيْسَ مَعَهُ غَيْرُهُ قَالَ يَجْعَلُ التِّكَّةَ عَلَى عَاتِقِهِ .

en.hubeali: (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding a man who prays in a trouser, not having anything else with him. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He should make the (cloth) waistband to upon his neck’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Muhammad in a marfu‘ manner has narrated the following: “About a man who performs Salah (prayer) wearing a pant (pajama) with no other clothes, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘He is to secure it with a drawstring to his shoulder.’”
